pricing_model: Hybrid: Tiered SaaS subscription + usage-based consumption (AI compute/task credits), with outcome-based enterprise contracts tied to engineering cost displacement.

pricing_tiers.name: Free (Solo Dev)
pricing_tiers.limits: 50 AI task-credits/month, 1 project, community support, single-agent access

pricing_tiers.name: Pro
pricing_tiers.target: Freelancers & small teams shipping production code
pricing_tiers.limits: 2,000 task-credits/month, multi-agent orchestration, CI/CD integration, priority queue

pricing_tiers.name: Team
pricing_tiers.limits: 10,000 pooled task-credits/month, shared agent memory, code review automation, SSO, analytics dashboard

pricing_tiers.name: Enterprise
pricing_tiers.limits: Unlimited task-credits (with fair-use), dedicated fine-tuned agents, on-prem/VPC deployment, custom SLAs, security & compliance package

freemium_features: Basic AI code generation and debugging
premium_features: Multi-agent parallel task execution (full feature builds, not just snippets)
Autonomous PR creation, testing, and deployment
Advanced code review & security scanning agents
Custom agent fine-tuning on private codebase
Priority compute allocation and faster turnaround
enterprise_offerings: Dedicated on-prem/VPC deployment for data sovereignty
Custom-trained agents on proprietary architecture & standards
Guaranteed SLAs (uptime, task turnaround, human-escalation path)
Dedicated customer success + solutions engineering team
Outcome-based pricing option (pay per feature shipped / bug resolved)
Integration with internal enterprise dev tools (Jira, ServiceNow, GitHub Enterprise)
discounts: Startup program: 50% off Team tier for companies <2 years old / pre-Series A
Volume discounts for 50+ seats on Enterprise
Migration incentive: 3 months free when switching from competitor AI dev tools
upsell_strategy: Free-to-Pro: task-credit ceiling triggers upgrade prompt with usage analytics showing value delivered
Pro-to-Team: unlock team collaboration, shared memory, and pooled credits as headcount grows
Team-to-Enterprise: triggered by need for custom fine-tuning, compliance, or exceeding usage thresholds
Cross-sell add-ons: security scanning module, design-to-code agent, QA/testing agent, DevOps automation agent
Usage-based overage billing that naturally nudges customers to next tier for better unit economics
annual_plan_benefits: Locked-in pricing protection against future price increases
Free onboarding and dedicated implementation support
Priority access to new agent capabilities and beta features
positioning: Positioned as a force-multiplier and cost-displacement engine for engineering organizations — priced not as a developer tool add-on, but as a fraction of the cost of a human engineer's fully-loaded salary, making adoption an obvious ROI decision for CTOs and engineering leaders.
summary: The pricing strategy blends a low-friction freemium/Pro entry point to drive individual developer adoption and viral growth, with a usage-based cost structure that scales naturally with AI compute consumption. Team and Enterprise tiers monetize the core value proposition — replacing or radically augmenting software engineering labor — through seat-based and outcome-based pricing that is explicitly benchmarked against engineer salary costs, making the ROI narrative central to sales motion. Discounts and startup programs seed bottom-up adoption, while enterprise contracts capture top-down budget reallocated from engineering headcount, ensuring the pricing model scales revenue in direct proportion to the value and cost savings delivered.
